{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","id":"msg_011Cd8TB3DDRP2ifriNRhiJ6","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_011c22Nqpr9C8q7JSMy2ir3G","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/app/solution.py","content":"def parse_line(line):\n    \"\"\"\n    Parse a single line from a config file.\n\n    Returns:\n        (key, value) tuple if the line is a key/value pair\n        None if the line is a comment or empty\n    \"\"\"\n    stripped = line.lstrip()\n\n    if not stripped or stripped[0] == '#':\n        return None\n\n    if '=' not in line:\n        return None\n\n    key, value = line.split('=', 1)\n    return (key.strip(), value.strip())\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":6,"cache_creation_input_tokens":271,"cache_read_input_tokens":23503,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":271},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"0cd37106-4518-4358-965b-c007e888e19f","uuid":"a7c234ab-f27d-43b7-9bbe-229d83d8e8ed","timestamp":"2026-07-17T22:53:55.667Z","request_id":"req_011Cd8TB2PMmymqFp2P7sewn"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_011c22Nqpr9C8q7JSMy2ir3G","type":"tool_result","content":"File created successfully at: /app/solution.py (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"0cd37106-4518-4358-965b-c007e888e19f","uuid":"9f65c304-3883-4b2a-a299-075cb4b44d67","timestamp":"2026-07-17T22:53:55.682Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"create","filePath":"/app/solution.py","content":"def parse_line(line):\n    \"\"\"\n    Parse a single line from a config file.\n\n    Returns:\n        (key, value) tuple if the line is a key/value pair\n        None if the line is a comment or empty\n    \"\"\"\n    stripped = line.lstrip()\n\n    if not stripped or stripped[0] == '#':\n        return None\n\n    if '=' not in line:\n        return None\n\n    key, value = line.split('=', 1)\n    return (key.strip(), value.strip())\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null,"userModified":false}}
